candidate_definition_hints.text: Encode/decode/info to KTX/KTX2/DDS files with LDR/HDR and BC/ASTC/ETC2.  Mac/Win C++11 too, Mac viewer, and scripts for batch processing textures.
The suite of kram tools below. I hope these improve your game, app, and art development.
